LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 501, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER, CALENDAR OF MAR-02-1998, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER NO OPPOSITION; SEE EXECUTED ORDER.
